title: Pteroceras caligare
taxonomy: Pteroceras caligare belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a genus of orchids. It is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The classification of Pteroceras caligare includes its ranking as a species within the family Orchidaceae and the order Asparagales. Pteroceras caligare is a relatively lesser-known species within the Orchidaceae family. Its classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic relationships to other orchid species.
uses: Pteroceras caligare, although lesser-known, has been reported to have potential medicinal properties.
